visual: Balances on one leg and swings the other leg in a wide outward crescent arc, hands slapping the foot as it crosses the body.
motion_description: The movement begins with a continuous full-circle pivot to the right, shifting the body's weight entirely onto the left leg while the torso turns. During the rotation, the right arm sweeps horizontally and finishes extended forward at chest height, with the left hand resting near the right elbow. Balancing steadily on the left leg, the right straight leg swings upward in a wide, outward crescent arc across the front of the body. Both hands briefly slap the right foot near chest level as it crosses, after which the right leg descends to tap the heel lightly on the floor.
